posts.author: Flowtech (Flowtech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

DocCreate now lets you generate, send and capture signatures on documents all within your monday.com boards.
No tool switching. Everything in one place.

What You Can Do
Send documents for signature instantly
Capture legally binding signatures
Track status in real time
Automate signature requests via board automations

How It Works
Generate → Send → Sign → Auto-update in your board

Ideal For
Contracts • Agreements • HR Docs • Client Approvals • Vendor Forms
Perfect for real estate, construction, HR, legal, finance & operations teams.

Why It Matters
No third party e-sign tools

Faster approvals & deal closures

Centralized workflows

Built for high volume use

Get Started
Learn more: DocCreate FAQs – Help & Support for monday.com App
Get support: Contact DocCreate Support | Help & Feature Requests
Watch tutorial: https://youtu.be/YZgjIr9W364?si=WdMVTF9WMz1maJ0Q

What are you trying to achieve

The goal of Built In Signature Capture is to complete the entire document workflow inside monday.com from creation to signing without relying on external tools.

We’re solving a major gap where teams had to:

  1. Generate documents in one tool
  2. Send via another
  3. Track signatures manually

With this feature, DocCreate brings everything into one seamless, automated workflow.
